prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: 4SN-GARDENTOOL-HOE
Product Type: SOIL_TILLER_CULTIVATOR
Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux
Existing Title: ToolTreaux Wooden Steel Handheld Garden Hoe Cultivator Combo Gardening Tool
Description: The 11” Wooden Steel Handheld Hoe Cultivator Combo Tool is a great addition to your arsenal of gardening tools, gardening supplies, or gardening accessories!

The wooden, handheld garden hoe cultivator combo tool is an essential tool for:

-Breaking up large areas of soil ahead before springtime planting
-Weeding and aerating soil so plants can receive the essential nutrients they need to grow
-Removing clods of soil in a garden bed, plant pot or flower pot

The main purpose or function of the versatile 2 in 1 hoe cultivator is to aerate and break up soil prior to planting. While it’s generally a great, all-purpose gardening tool, you’ll find it most useful for gardening tasks that involve preparing the soil for planting or transplanting, not for the finer details of finishing touches. 

Featuring wooden handles, a steel tool head, and a comfortable soft foam grip, this garden hoe cultivator tool is easy to handle, durable, and will last you through many gardening seasons to come. For longevity sake, rinse and dry the garden hoe cultivator tool when you are done gardening, planting or weeding, and store in a dry place.
Search Terms: gardening hoe tools gifts kit shears trowels mini hand knee pad succulent plant care indoor stand garden shovel rake gardening tools for women heavy duty steel handheld weeding tools equipment seeds pots augers leaf rake landscaping tools
Features:
- DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Features a sturdy steel tool head, wooden handle, and soft foam grip for comfortable, long-lasting use across multiple gardening seasons.

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 11" Wooden Steel Handheld Garden Hoe Cultivator

tokens.name: Wooden Steel Handheld Garden Hoe Cultivator

anthropic.title_differentiation: 2-In-1 Hoe And Cultivator, Durable Steel Head, Wooden Handle, Soft Foam Grip, Soil Aeration And Weeding

openai.title_differentiation: Steel Head, Wooden Handle, Soft Foam Grip, Weeding And Aerating Soil, 2-In-1 Garden Tool, Planting Prep
